summary:
AUSTRALIAN MUSICIAN VISION: Brandon discusses a previous vision concerning a blonde, curly-haired Australian woman who plays the acoustic guitar and writes heavenly music that reaches the top charts. Brandon shares that a follower identified this individual as a new artist named Lily Wood, and Brandon believes she matches the exact details of the vision, bringing a spiritual fragrance to the Father through her music.

VATICAN TUNNELS AND GLOBAL SHAKING: Brandon explicitly states he saw tunnels underneath Vatican City and Rome that were being used for nefarious purposes. Brandon mentions that a major shaking is coming to awaken many religions in the days ahead, heavily referencing 1 Corinthians 5:5 regarding these impending events.

GEOPOLITICAL LEADERS AND SHADOW FUNDING: Brandon describes a vision where Emmanuel Macron is portrayed as a future tyrant, associated with individuals performing satanic sacrifices to usher in the Antichrist system and cause government instability through paid protesters. Brandon states that Volodymyr Zelensky is being strong-armed by Donald Trump to pause conflicts and bring peace, causing Zelensky to look to Macron for guidance. According to Brandon, these European political actions are being secretly funded by ultra-wealthy businessmen, referred to as suits or George with money, who are manipulated by Lucifer to maintain a constant state of war and prevent the United States from dictating peace terms.

BLACK SWAN EVENTS AND NATO TENSIONS: Brandon recounts a vision of a black swan with an orange beak and feet emerging from the Eiffel Tower in Paris. Brandon explicitly links this imagery to planned events designed to force the United States and Donald Trump to remain entangled in NATO, despite Trump's desire to separate from the alliance.

MONARCHY AND MIDDLE EASTERN CONFLICTS: Brandon describes seeing the King of England turn into a scorpion, pointing his pincers toward Zelensky and Macron while facing Australia and Canada, which Brandon connects to an escalation of war. Furthermore, Brandon claims that military actions are being orchestrated to bring forth the Mahdi, trigger a global economic crisis, and implement a digital ID system. Brandon notes that Islamic Brotherhood factions, Hamas, and Syria are regrouping, while a two-faced leader lies to Donald Trump about an upcoming brutal attack that will occur at night and be worse than October 7th.

TERROR TACTICS AND TARGETED LOCATIONS: Brandon warns of plots involving drones purchased from platforms like Amazon, rigged with explosives to attack crowds during European tree-lighting ceremonies and New Year's Eve parades. Brandon highlights specific threats, including a semi-truck aiming to run over pedestrians on the Las Vegas Strip, and plots against major shopping malls involving escalators, food courts, and attackers wearing Santa or elf hats in a scenario described as shooting fish in a barrel. Brandon also identifies a cafe with French pastries and a train station near the Eiffel Tower in Paris as a targeted location.

CHURCH SCANDALS AND DOMESTIC THREATS: Brandon states that megachurches across all denominations, explicitly referencing Steven Furtick as a representation of seeker-friendly churches, need prayer for protection against events designed to cause chaos. Brandon also warns of an imminent, embarrassing scandal about to break loose in one of the largest churches in Africa. Additionally, Brandon highlights the National and Capitol Christmas trees in Washington, D.C., and the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade as areas requiring vigilance.

WEATHER MANIPULATION AND CRYPTIC COMMUNICATIONS: Brandon claims that upcoming unusual weather patterns, including severe Arctic freezes and Siberian air hitting the United States, are the result of weather modification and manipulation rather than natural winter phenomena. Brandon also points to the Rockefeller puzzle and the cover of the Economist magazine featuring Xi Jinping as cryptic communication methods used by wealthy elites to signal their future plans.

FUTURE TIMELINES AND THE 2026 OLYMPICS: Brandon details visions concerning the year 2026, noting that Donald Trump is being targeted by a well-thought-out demonic plot, represented by a marine octopus spirit producing an ink screen to block prophetic sight. Brandon states that Trump plans to visit Italy for the 2026 Olympic Games and emphasizes the need for his protection. Brandon highlights specific future dates, including April 13, 2026, drawing a parallel to the timing of the 1995 Oklahoma City bombing, and warns of major destabilization events planned for July 4, 2026, coinciding with the 250th anniversary of the United States. Brandon describes a battle plan map showing targets such as the Washington Monument, the Lincoln Memorial, the White House, the Capitol, Chicago, New York, and San Francisco.
rawData: [November 25, 2025]-[Praying over Black friday shoppers]-[https://youtu.be/u_fT7KW6hXA]-[Well, good evening family. Thank you for joining me again tonight. I really appreciate it. We have much prayer to do concerning our nation and what the Lord revealed to us. Even yesterday, if it wasn't for what he showed me yesterday, I probably would have taken today off. I was watching on Angel TV or whatever it was. D was watching Christmas movies. I love those, you know, whatever they are. There's one on there that was really good—that little movie thing—but some of them are kind of cheesy. I go, 'It's not that good. Turn that off.' But there's one that's really cute; I liked it. But all glory to Jesus. Let's go over some things that the Lord showed us real quick. We'll make it quick for all of you. I want to show you something that was sent to us in an email today that I think will really bless you. A lady sent this. She said, 'Brandon, I was thinking about what you said about the young lady from Australia that would write a new song.' So I was looking for her to see if she existed. And so I just Googled a music artist whose name is Lily, and I thought, 'Well, that was creative.' We don't have time to study all this. So if everybody recalls, what the Lord showed us was a lily coming up out of Australia that would have a song that would hit top charts eventually, that would sing something that was heavenly music, and that the Lord would use this young lady. And I said she's blonde-headed with curlier hair and she plays an acoustic guitar is what I saw in the vision. And I saw her playing, but as she was in Australia, I saw that Lily would bring a fragrance before the Father. And I saw the pistils that have the yellow on the top, and it was black in the center and pink on the outsides, but it brought a fragrance before the Lord with great heavenly worship. So this lady, I guess she had extra time today, and she said, 'Brandon, I found her. I found her. Is this her?' And I said, 'Well, you know, let me see. I'm always curious.' So this lady right here, her name is Lily, and play... 'Hi, I'm Lily Wood. I'm at the CCM Cafe. Hi, I'm Lily Wood. I'm at the CCM Cafe, and this song is 'The Servant King.'' She's just getting started, and I thought, 'Keep going a little bit more.' 'It'd be messy and gray, probably have dishes in the sink.' Okay, isn't that neat? I laughed about it. I said it's so precise the way he talks to me, and I'm so thankful that he does. You know, he's such a cool—it's amazing to me. But the blonde, Lily, Lily is her name, and she plays an acoustic guitar and she's Australian, and the Lord said she would write music in the days ahead. I don't know if she'll do it now, if she's already done it, or if she has these ideas, but heavenly music will come to her. And I believe with what I have seen in the vision, this is the young woman. I said she's blonde with long hair. If everybody goes back to that, do they remember, Braden? Do they remember? I can't see the feedback. I'm behind a camera. So I'm always curious if you all remember Lily. I said, 'Do you? It comes back.' Isn't that neat? So whoever did the research on that, thank you. It blessed me because I thought, 'Surely this is her, Father. Surely this is her.' She—even her cheeks, the way she—it's cheek appear... I thought, 'Isn't that pretty cool?' I said, 'And she has her own little tune.' I liked it. Play a couple of seconds again. I thought it sounded kind of like a David's harp. I thought it sounded cool. 'My thought was a house; it'd be messy, cold, and gray.' Is that neat? I thought, 'Surely.' I don't like the words necessarily of the song, but I thought, 'Is that her?' Kind of interesting. I don't know. Something to pray about. Pray for her. She has like 20 people that follow her. But I thought, isn't that interesting? Maybe not to you all, but to me it is. All glory to Jesus. So the next thing I want to talk about is what the Lord showed us concerning Emmanuel Macron and Zelensky. And yesterday, the Lord showed me a lot of very hard things concerning tunnels underneath the Vatican. And I'm just going to be bold about it. I saw tunnels underneath the Vatican. These tunnels were used for not good things. And people go, 'Well, Brandon, you're—' No, no, no. I'm just bold about what he said. And I saw tunnels underneath Rome. I saw darkness underneath Rome. Now, if there's no tunnels underneath there, you can throw an egg at me. But I saw tunnels underneath Rome. And it was concerning Vatican City, that area. There was something there. Now you say, 'What were the tunnels for?' I'm not going to get into all that. There's a shaking coming to awaken many religions, many people in the days ahead. And the Lord keeps warning us about this over and over again. He keeps giving us 1 Corinthians 5:5. But then he warned us about Emmanuel Macron again last night. And he said, 'This man will become a tyrant in the days ahead.' And I saw the satanic sacrifice—and not with him, but with people that were associated. And I saw George again. And people said, 'George Bush.' No, not George Bush. Come on. George with money. These people were associated with this to bring forth the Antichrist system, to bring instability in governments, paid protesters, rioters, things like that. And the Lord warned us about this. But as I was seeing, Zelensky was being strong-armed by President Trump. He was being strong-armed, and he was looking over his shoulder to Emmanuel Macron, his buddy. 'What do I do? What do I do?' he was saying because they wanted to keep the status quo of war, war, war, to pump the economy of Europe. Zelensky was part of this, and I saw him trying to step in like the big brother. You see this? Do you see these pictures? This is exactly what I see coming. But I saw whenever President Trump was cracking his whip... Part of the major word that he gave us for 2025 was Donald Trump would stand in a position of cracking his whip as he became president this year. And I saw him cracking his whip, cracking his whip, cracking his whip. And he would make them pause, for he was calling for peace. And the Bible says, 'Blessed are the peacemakers.' And he was doing his best to create peace throughout the Middle East, peace throughout these areas. And as he was doing this, they were all watching and being paused for a second because, you know, he's the 800-pound gorilla in the room. But I saw them devising a plan. I need you to hear me really carefully tonight. I saw them devising a plan in the spirit, a secret dark plan that was funded by the people. There were suits. Okay? And this is what I did not reveal last night, but I felt more peace about it today. I saw a group of suits. You say, 'What does that mean?' Men with money. A group of men with money were backing them. So Emmanuel Macron is right here in the vision, separated by suits that were fogged. I could not see their faces, but these men were funders. They were businessmen and big business money in Europe that did not want peace, that did not want the United States to dictate this war. Who was behind the suits was Lucifer and Satan. He was behind them, and he was the one pushing the suits to get them to react, to make the politicians do what they wanted them to do through finances. 'You do what we tell you to do or we cut you off.' And that's the way it is with the Democrats and the Republicans. But the Lord showed me men with money control the world. Men with money, not politicians, men with money. And they were controlled by the devil. People who have big money. I'm not talking about a couple million dollars; I'm talking about billionaires, multi-billionaires. I was seeing this all happen. As that was happening, I saw—and this is what you all need to know—I saw Europe. I saw Emmanuel Macron and I saw, coming out of the Eiffel Tower, a black swan with an orange beak and orange feet, looking like a duck. It was pure black. The Lord said, "Watch for events to keep them strong-arming Trump because he's a part of NATO." You see that bird? That's what I saw coming out of the Eiffel Tower. I saw it coming out of Europe. I saw Trump not wanting to be a part, but swearing an allegiance that he would be a part because of these events to keep America entangled. As America was trying to separate, there were events planned to pull America back in. We should leave NATO, from what I saw. It's just my opinion. I saw the King of England turn into a scorpion with his stinger up. He turned and faced with his pincers toward Zelensky and Macron, then turned his body around towards Australia and Canada. He was pinching his fingers; the King of England was a scorpion with his tail ready to strike. He came out of the palace where he lives and was looking around as a scorpion, and I could see his face in the scorpion's body. As I watched him, he was focused on Emmanuel Macron. I saw an escalation of things again to bring forth war. The Lord showed me it has to do with bringing forth the Mahdi. It has to do with creating instability for a global economic crisis to bring in a digital platform and a digital ID system. That's why I saw old military jeeps again last night. It's a metaphor; we don't use that stuff anymore. We use armored vehicles and Hummers. I saw an old World War II event trying to take place and wrap its coils around Europe. I went to Israel and the Lord said, "Regrouping." They're regrouping Hamas, Syria, and others. I saw this man—whether he is Prime Minister or King—he was two-faced. The Lord said to me, "He's devising a plan, talking to the Islamic Brotherhood." He said they are able to lie. The Lord said they are lying; they're two-faced. Pray for Trump to have great discernment in the days ahead, for he is being lied to and played by this man, by MBS and others. They are sworn to an alliance, but they believe they don't have to tell him the truth. The Lord said it was tied to the Islamic faith. I thought that was interesting because they called him an infidel. I saw great alliances with the Islamic Brotherhood coming out in the days ahead. They're regrouping, licking their wounds, but they have plotted a plan. They're furious about how Gaza went—they feel they lost Palestine and those areas—and they were devising a plan for a brutal attack in the days ahead, worse than October 7th. It will happen at night while they're sleeping. That's what the Lord showed me in these visions. Then he showed me drones being used for terrorist activity in the days ahead. It wasn't all about America; it was about Europe. I saw them buying drones from Amazon or whatever and attaching things to detonate into crowds during tree-lighting ceremonies and parades, like New Year's Eve. They were trying to bring forth fear and terror without having to be present. They were in a location further away so they could land these into areas where people were gathered and celebrating. The Lord said, "Watch Las Vegas, Nevada." I saw a semi-truck trying to run down the Strip and use it to maul people down because it's hard to stop. It's a big truck. Then I saw, "Pray over Steven Furtick and his church." Pray for protection over megachurches. It wasn't necessarily all about Steven Furtick; it was a representation of that type of church, a poster child for the seeker-friendly church in America. The Lord said it's not only about Charismatics but all denominations. Pray over the megachurch concerning major events that would try to bring instability and chaos. Then I saw a humongous church, one of the largest in Africa. The Lord said a major scandal is about to break loose in this church. It was embarrassing, which is why he brought up 1 Corinthians 5:5. He said, "I've warned and I've warned, but so many people have not taken heed." They must know the seriousness of the hour. We're praying over Black Friday shopping, tree-lighting ceremonies like Rockefeller Center, drones, and lone-wolf attacks. He highlighted Washington, D.C. I saw a major tree in Washington and the Lord said, "Pray over this area." There are two major trees in Washington, D.C. each year: the National Christmas Tree and the Capitol Christmas Tree. We're going to pray over that tonight—not the tree, but the event and the people. I'm talking about the people. We want to pray over our president. We must keep him protected. He must finish the job that God has set him to do. He must live long and finish strong. God has an assignment, and you will see that assignment even more in 2026 and 2027. We must pray over our elections concerning the midterm, that we would not have a stalemate government. This is very serious stuff going on. Very serious stuff. November 24th. After Thanksgiving, on Tuesday, December 2nd, and December 4th, we pray over these events on November 29th. That would be Friday or Saturday. Saturday night, we pray over Saturday. These events are highlighted to me to pray over them. We don't give the devil any foothold. We don't give him any place. We want to keep our thumb on somebody so they can't wiggle around. As the body of Christ, we don't give him any place to maneuver or cause any kind of havoc in our nation and your nation, Europe, from what I saw. This doesn't just have to do with America. This is something very serious concerning the Christmas holidays and holiday shopping in your area, particularly Germany and France. Major cities were highlighted to me, like Rome, Italy. Then we have the weather events and all the other things I told you about. New Year's Eve. Again, he showed me New Year's Eve. He warned us about major Arctic freezes in America. There would be unusual cold fronts, Siberian air. You said, 'Well, we have those, Brandon. Of course, it's winter.' No, there are going to be unusual weather patterns in the days ahead, an unusual winter. That's just what I'm praying over right now. They say we have a major cold front coming December 1st here in Oklahoma. They're saying all this major cold air, but I see weather manipulation, weather modification, weather that is not normal weather. That's what I have. I find little things and I tinker with them. I have a nail in my hand; I don't even know why the nail's there. It's on my table, so I find it. It's either that or my fingernail clippers, or cough drops. I have all kinds of things that I tinker with when I'm talking. I feel things, I push on them. People go, 'What's he doing with the nail?' I don't know. But I went over that thing yesterday. People were all interested in the puzzle. Do you want to show them that before I pray? Put in the comment section down below what you think they're trying to say about this picture. Do you think it's nothing, or do you feel like there's something to this? It's made by the Rockefellers, and I think there's something to it. It's not normal. I believe they communicate with that. If you go back to the Economist main thing every year, they always put out their prediction, and they put one out for 2028. That was the one with Xi Jinping and the panda bear. This is not normal; this is them communicating. The cover this year is interesting to me. So you can put in the comment section down below what stands out to you. Braden, put the other one up there with the 24. Let them look at that for a second. Vladimir Putin—I think the swords are interesting. All right. Well, maybe it's a big nothing burger. I try to let you in my little world of things that I think are interesting. I've been drinking a ton of water to keep flushing my body. I believe that's where we are right now. Father, I just thank you, Lord, for another great day today. We lift this body up before you. We thank you, Father, for all that you've done for us, for anointing us for such a time as this. We pray for our president, we pray for the peace of Jerusalem, we pray for our pastors, and we pray for the prophetic. We pray for these black swan events. We thank you, Father, that you've called us to the kingdom for such a time as this. You chose every single one of us—all 4,200 people on here tonight. You call us the closers. You told me, 'Brandon, there will be a generation that doesn't taste death, and you are that generation.' Thank you, Father. That means you saved the best for last. God, I thank you for all the people that are representing you. We have the best of the best prayer warriors on this prayer channel. Every single person brings their supply because when we pray together, there's power, for Many hands make light work. Father, I thank you for every single person represented here tonight. I call them healed and whole and well. My wife and I, and my son, we all agree that they are healed and whole and well, and they lack no good thing. We lift up this body before you. We thank you, Lord, that you were wounded for our transgressions and bruised for our iniquity. The chastisement of our peace was upon you, and with your stripes, we are healed. This represents so much more than just a little wafer in a cup of juice. Jesus paid the price for us to walk in victory over sickness, disease, poverty, lack, and mental torment. People are battling depression during this holiday season. They feel alone or that they don't have relatives. But Father, you said you'd never leave us and you'd never forsake us. You're their family during this beautiful holiday season. We lift up the people who are alone and we thank you, Father, that they are never alone because you're always with them. I pray, Father, for peace. You are the Prince of Peace. And Father, right now, I ask you to flood their hearts, flood their minds, flood their beings, Father, with your holy, beautiful presence. That sweet-smelling fragrance, the fragrance of the Holy Spirit, that peace that passes all understanding. Goodness and mercy will follow them all the days of their life. Father, if they've lost somebody tragically this year, like Erica—she lost Charlie and their kids are in this first Thanksgiving without having their father there, without having her husband there—and anybody else who lost somebody that's dear to them this year, I thank you, Father, that you fill that void. Father, that you are that joy; we find that joy unspeakable and full of glory in these last days. Father, I know that days of darkness and days of hardness come, but Father, you said, 'Occupy until I come and enjoy life.' Brandon, you tell me all the time, 'Brandon, just enjoy life. I want you to have fun and enjoy life. Don't look at all the darkness around you. Keep vertical and keep your eyes on me in this darkness.' And dark times will come; dark times happen. But Father, you are my vertical. We keep our eyes on you and we don't go horizontal looking all around us. We keep our eyes on you. We stay the course knowing that you are that peace. I pray for every single person right now that has that sense of just that void of depression and anxiety and feeling so lonely. We thank you, Lord, that you are that God who brings comfort to the person who needs comfort. I believe, Father, that this is the day that they're going to have a turnaround in their emotions, a turnaround in the sadness that they feel. And Father, those who are full of joy right now and this is a breeze for them—they love the holidays; the holidays are awesome; they love this time of year—I thank you that you would double the joy on their lives and that, Father, it would flow out of them and spill over to the people who are not having that joyous time. Father, you brought joy on every single one of us, that joy unspeakable and full of glory. Father, we don't just harbor it in ourselves, but we dump it out on the other people and they see that light and they say, 'There's hope in your eyes. There's joy in your eyes.' And every single one of us would be that salt and we wouldn't lose our saltiness. I thank you, Father, for this beautiful Thanksgiving season that's coming up. There's peace in homes and there's no strife around the tables when we eat as families in the days ahead; that you're not bickering and fighting. Father, there's peace, and there's not Democrat versus Republican and Catholic against the charismatic; we all get along and they say, 'Man, there's just joy. I love being around you.' I have to tell myself all the time because I was not a person who liked Christmas for years; in fact, I despised Christmas. Not because of Jesus, but because of being around people. And I had to say it to myself, 'I love Christmas. I love being around folks.' I say it all the time; I have to say it to myself all the time. I'm just being real with y'all. It's something that I've struggled with all the time. I used to go around even whenever I was saying, 'I hate the Christmas season.' And that may sound really bad, but I'm just telling you something I've had to overcome. I say, 'I love the Christmas season. I love this timeframe of the year. I love the lights.' I thank God for Christmas get-togethers at the church or whatever. I used to hate that; I used to say it so much and I had what I said, and it's something that I've worked on because Diana loves Christmas. Loves it. And so do my kids. But I just always go... and they said, 'Daddy, why do you always say that?' I say, 'I don't know. I need to work on it.' And so I've worked on it; it's something that I love now. I go, 'Hey, I love this season.' Paisley loves it; it's so wonderful. I don't like the materialism of it. I think that's where it all started with me as somebody growing up. I hate the materialistic side of it, how everybody acts. I don't like all of the spending and the debt and the pressure—'Well, you bought me this and I've got to buy you that because if you don't, it's offensive because your gift is not as nice as mine.' I don't like that competitive crap and it's why I always was like, 'You know what? I don't want to participate in it.' So anyone say, 'What you want for Christmas?' Nothing. I don't want anything. And that's the way I always was for a long time. 'I'll bless you.' 'Don't bless me. I don't care about it.' And that's why there's a lot of people that are similar to being like that. So I'm just trying to encourage you. Christmas is beautiful. It's about Jesus. He deserves a day. People say, 'Well, it's pagan. You're doing this and that.' No. Jesus deserves a day. Jesus deserves a year. Jesus deserves everything. But if you don't celebrate him at Christmas, celebrate him sometime. He deserves it. That's what I told my kids. We make him a big Christmas cake and write 'Happy Birthday' on it. We even allowed you all to be a part of that last year. We celebrated and had a cake and did it all. We show you what we do as a family. We make it about Jesus being the reason for the season. And all of this—all the materialism, all Black Friday, and all the hype—I keep Jesus the main thing. I refuse to rob him of it and let Santa Claus take the glory. Santa Claus isn't coming to my house. I'm always saying Santa Claus doesn't exist in this house. Jesus does. He's the provider. There isn't a man in a red suit. Jesus provides for my kids. I never let someone take the glory other than Jesus Christ; he gets all the glory in my house. And we've raised our kids that way. Jesus is the reason for this season, not some big guy in a red suit. It's fun, okay, a fairy tale, whatever you want to say, but Jesus is the reason. He is the reason for our season. And we give him all the glory, honor, and praise. And we give him a birthday cake; he may not eat it in the natural, but we celebrate with him like he's there. And we have video showing you what we do. It's all glory to Jesus. We always give the glory to Jesus in this beautiful season. And now we give you praise and thanksgiving. You are so real to us, and when you get real with God, God will become real to you. We make sure we always keep the main thing the main thing. Jesus is important in our home. Jesus is provider. Jesus is our healer. Jesus is our comforter. You got that there, babe? There it is. Merry Christmas. Brownies or cookies or something. And so this year, Diana found it. Happy? Did you see it? Yeah. It's important. It's so important. Thank you, Father. Thank you, Father, for what you did for this household this year. As we close out 2025, thank you that we are thriving and we come alive and all the things you can say to rhyme with it. Everything that was is what you've done for us and we're so grateful. We're so healed and whole and well—mentally, emotionally, physically, financially. You have been good to Brandon and Diana, and my children. We praise you, Father. We thank you, Lord, for 2025 as we have a day of thanksgiving coming. We take this body right now in Jesus' name. I know it was different, but it's just from the heart. People make things so religious. Get real with God; he will become real to you. Stop treating him like he's untouchable. He wants you to sit in his lap. Jesus made it possible for you to sit with him in the heavenlies and take the blood of Jesus. What represents the blood is what makes it that way. Thank you, Jesus, for your blood, because if it wasn't for you, who eradicated sin and got rid of it all, I would be in so much trouble. We would all have to sacrifice a bull, and the vegans would really hate it. What would you do then if we still had to sacrifice a goat or a sheep for sin or whatever? They'd be saying, 'Oh my God, what would you do? What would you vegans do then?' You're in trouble because you won't even eat it. So now you've got a cat killer for your sin. Thank Jesus even more for his blood, vegans. I'm just saying. I'm not trying to be funny. It's serious, y'all. You know, the tree huggers would hate it, but Jesus paid the price for you to walk in victory. And we don't have to kill any goats or bulls and all those things. Look what he did for us. There is so much to be thankful for. We take the blood, and we say we make much of the blood, and the blood makes much of us. Thank you, Lord, that we don't have to kill a goat or all this because you were the lamb slain from the foundation. You did it all. Jesus paid it all; all to him I owe. Thank you, Father. Thank you, Father. We praise the one who paid my debt and raises life up from the dead. I believe, Father, for the blood. I believe, Father, for what you did for us. You've been so good to us in Jesus' mighty name. Amen. Amen. Thank you, Lord. That's why I just try to be real with the Lord. You know, I tick a lot of religious people off. Good. I want to be able to go into the synagogue and flip the tables and say we have to be real with him. You've got to be real with Jesus. Stop being so flaky. Lord, I plead the blood over my eyes. If you want to show me anything, fine. If you don't, it's good, too. But we're here. And Lord, we pray over the things you showed us last time. Father, I don't even really truly know how to pray over all of that because it was so much in the natural of my natural tongue. But I pray in the spirit, and I lift up this war before you. I lift it up before you, Father. There are so many people losing their lives. They said an average of 10,000 people a day. Is that 70,000 a week? That is an astronomical amount of men and women dying on both sides. Lord, this has been going on for years. Lord, I thank you. No matter how many people and these big businessmen who are involved in this and these evil people who are trying to escalate war, I ask you, Father, to put a stop to the war. Help us, Holy Spirit. Work on the behalf that Zelensky would be removed, that this government would be put in, and that they would bring peace to Ukraine. The Ukrainian people would have peace and stop having all the bloodshed; they're precious to you and precious in your sight. The same with the Russians. We pray over every Russian representative here who has lost people just like the Ukrainians.
